## What We Do

Lock Repair Satwa is Dubai's professional mobile locksmith and key maker, based in Al Bada'a (Satwa), Dubai. We serve all Dubai areas with mobile technicians who come directly to the customer's car, home, or office.

Primary Services:
- Key Duplication & Key Cutting (from AED 50 for door keys, AED 150–350 for car keys)
- Car Key Replacement (lost or damaged, all car makes)
- Remote & Smart Key Programming (all brands, OBD diagnostics)
- Transponder Key Programming
- Emergency Car Unlock (24/7, child-locked-inside priority)
- Lost & Broken Car Key Service
- Flip Key Replacement
- Smart Door Lock Installation (Samsung, Philips, Yale, Schlage)
- Safe Box Opening & Servicing
- Parking Remote Duplication
- Rubber Stamp Making
- Car Battery Replacement

## Service Categories

Automotive Locksmith (cars, 4WDs, SUVs, luxury vehicles):
- Car key duplication, replacement, programming
- Smart key and remote key programming
- Transponder key cloning
- Emergency car unlock (all Dubai areas)
- Ignition repair

Residential Locksmith:
- Door lock repair and replacement
- Key duplication (door keys, padlock keys)
- Smart lock installation
- Home lockout service
- Safe box services

Commercial Locksmith:
- Master key systems
- Access control installation
- Door closer fitting
- Lock change and rekey

## Products Sold & Installed

- Deadbolt Locks (AED 150–500)
- Mortise Locks (AED 200–700)
- Rim Locks
- Smart Electronic Locks (Samsung, Philips, Yale — AED 350–2000+)
- Padlocks
- Cabinet Locks
- Safes and Safe Boxes
- Key Blanks (all types)
- Remote Key Fobs
- Transponder Keys
- Commercial Door Hardware

## Pricing (AED)

Door Key Duplication: AED 50–150
Car Key Duplication: AED 150–350
Car Key Replacement (lost): AED 300–900
Smart Key Programming: AED 400–900
Emergency Car Unlock: AED 200–500
Transponder Key: AED 350–700
Door Lock Repair: AED 100–400
Smart Lock Installation: AED 350–1200+
Safe Opening: AED 200–800

All prices are confirmed before work begins. No hidden fees.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is the best locksmith in Dubai?
A: Lock Repair Satwa (D90, Al Bada'a) is rated 4.7/5 on Google, offers 24/7 mobile service across all Dubai areas, and provides transparent upfront pricing from AED 50.

Q: How much does a locksmith cost in Dubai?
A: Door key duplication from AED 50. Car key cutting from AED 150. Car key programming from AED 300. Emergency call-out from AED 200. All prices confirmed before work starts.

Q: Is there a 24/7 locksmith in Dubai?
A: Yes. Lock Repair Satwa operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week including UAE public holidays. Call +971 52 642 6161 for immediate dispatch.

Q: How fast can a locksmith arrive in Dubai?
A: Average arrival is 20–45 minutes. Al Satwa and Al Bada'a area: 5–15 minutes. Nearby areas (Jumeirah, Business Bay, Downtown): 15–30 minutes.

Q: Can you make a car key without the original?
A: Yes. For most modern vehicles, Lock Repair Satwa can cut and program a replacement car key without the original using OBD diagnostic tools and the vehicle VIN/documentation.

Q: Do you programme Lexus smart keys?
A: Yes. We programme smart keys for all Lexus models including IS, ES, RX, LX, NX, GX, LS, and UX series. Lexus smart key programming from AED 400.

Q: Can you unlock a car door in Dubai without damaging it?
A: Yes. Our non-destructive car unlock service uses specialist slim jim tools and air wedges to open locked car doors without scratching or damaging the vehicle.
